zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertram de Criol於大約1236年出生在英國肯特普雷斯頓時，他的父親John De Criol28歲，母親Matilda Eastwell25歲。他於大約1269年與Eleanor de Crevequer結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1295年2月26日享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertram de Criol于大约1236年出生在英国肯特普雷斯頓时，他的父亲John De Criol28岁，母亲Matilda Eastwell25岁。他于大约1269年与Eleanor de Crevequer结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1295年2月26日享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Criol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Hipolito, Luis, Eriberto, Jose, Luisa, Ramon, Ricardo.  French/Haitian Edwige, Fritz, Serge, Yvrose.
Catalan: from the old personal name Oriol, from Latin Aureolus.

Catalan and French: nickname, possibly for a flamboyant dresser or sweet singer, from Catalan and Old French oriol ‘oriole’ (from Latin aureolus ‘golden’), a species of bird of which the male has bright yellow and black plumage. As a surname of French origin it is also common in Haiti.

variants.name: Oriel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Oriold, Oriel, from ancient Germanic Aurildis, Orieldis, composed of elements meaning ‘fire’ + ‘strife’.
French (Vosges): nickname from Old French oriel, a variant of oriol ‘oriole’ (see Oriol ).

nameMeanings.name: Bertram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. Ravens were traditional symbols of wisdom in Germanic mythology; Odin was regularly accompanied by ravens called Hugin and Munin. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. See also Bertrand .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertram de Criol was born about 1236, in Preston, Kent, England, his father, John De Criol, was 28 and his mother, Matilda Eastwell, was 25. He married Eleanor de Crevequer about 1269. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 26 February 1295, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertram de Criol est né environ 1236, à Preston, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John De Criol, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Matilda Eastwell, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Crevequer environ 1269. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 26 février 1295, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertram de Criol um 1236 in Preston, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Criol 28 und seine Mutter Matilda Eastwell 25. Er hat um 1269 Eleanor de Crevequer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 26. Februar 1295 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertram de Criol è nato il circa 1236 nel Preston, Kent, England, il suo padre, John De Criol, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Matilda Eastwell, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Crevequer circa 1269. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 26 febbraio 1295, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertram de Criolが約1236年にイギリスケントプレストンで生まれた時，父John De Criolは28歳，母Matilda Eastwellは25歳であった。約1269年にEleanor de Crevequerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1295年2月26日に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertram de Criol(이)가 대략 1236년 영국 켄트 플레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Criol(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Eastwell(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1269년 Eleanor de Crevequer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1295년 2월 26일 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertram de Criol nasceu aproximadamente 1236, em Preston, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John De Criol, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Eastwell, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Crevequer aproximadamente 1269. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 26 de fevereiro de 1295, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertram de Criol родился около 1236 г. в местности престон, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John De Criol было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Eastwell, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Crevequer около 1269 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 26 февраля 1295 г. в возрасте 60 лет.
